mapper.sql: id, code, workspace_id, project_code, name, description, dag_json, global_params, published_version_id, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at
mapper.select: select from t_r_workflow_definition where code = #{code} limit 1
select from t_r_workflow_definition where project_code = #{projectCode} order by updated_at desc
select from t_r_workflow_definition where workspace_id = #{workspaceId} order by updated_at desc
select from t_r_workflow_definition where code = #{code} for update

select count(*) from t_r_workflow_definition where workspace_id in
#{id}
